title: Internal Error when a CTE query with DISTINCT(ON) is used twice with UNION
description:
### What happens?

DuckDB crashes with "INTERNAL Error: Attempted to access index 1 within vector of size 1" if the query with DISTINCT defined under WITH clause is used twice with UNION.

**Working query:**

```sql
WITH
    t1 AS (FROM (VALUES (1,2,3), (1,2,2)) t(a, b, c)),
    t2 AS (SELECT DISTINCT a, b, c FROM t1)
SELECT a FROM t2;
```

**Failing queries:**

```sql
-- Simple DISTINCT
WITH
    t1 AS (FROM (VALUES (1,2,3), (1,2,2)) t(a, b, c)),
    t2 AS (SELECT DISTINCT a, b, c FROM t1)
SELECT a FROM t2
UNION ALL 
SELECT b FROM t2;
```

```sql
-- DISTINCT ON
WITH
    t1 AS (FROM (VALUES (1,2,3), (1,2,2)) t(a, b, c)),
    t2 AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (a) a, b, c FROM t1 ORDER BY c)
SELECT a FROM t2
UNION ALL 
SELECT b FROM t2;
```

The workaround is to use MATERIALIZED on the query with DISTINCT:
```sql
WITH
    t1 AS (FROM (VALUES (1,2,3), (1,2,2)) t(a, b, c)),
    t2 AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT DISTINCT a, b, c FROM t1)
SELECT a FROM t2
UNION ALL 
SELECT b FROM t2;
```



### To Reproduce

```sql
-- Simple DISTINCT
WITH
    t1 AS (FROM (VALUES (1,2,3), (1,2,2)) t(a, b, c)),
    t2 AS (SELECT DISTINCT a, b, c FROM t1)
SELECT a FROM t2
UNION ALL 
SELECT b FROM t2;
```

```sql
-- DISTINCT ON
WITH
    t1 AS (FROM (VALUES (1,2,3), (1,2,2)) t(a, b, c)),
    t2 AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (a) a, b, c FROM t1 ORDER BY c)
SELECT a FROM t2
UNION ALL 
SELECT b FROM t2;
```

### OS:

Windows 11

### DuckDB Version:

1.1.0

### DuckDB Client:

DBeaver - duckdb_jdbc driver

### Hardware:

_No response_

### Full Name:

Yury Levchenko

### Affiliation:

No affiliation

I have not tested with any build

### Did you include all relevant data sets for reproducing the issue?

Not applicable - the reproduction does not require a data set

- [X] Yes, I have

- [ ] Yes, I have
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, name VARCHAR(255), value FLOAT);
WITH t1 AS (SELECT DISTINCT id, name FROM test_table) SELECT id FROM t1 UNION ALL SELECT name FROM t1;
WITH t1 AS (SELECT id, name, value FROM test_table GROUP BY id, name, value ORDER BY value) SELECT id FROM t1 UNION ALL SELECT value FROM t1;
WITH t1 AS (SELECT DISTINCT id, name FROM test_table) SELECT name FROM t1 UNION ALL SELECT id FROM t1;
key_bug_features: CTE query with DISTINCT used twice with UNION
